seo.title: About — Vukan's Bike Shop
seo.description: The story of Vukan's Bike in Apače: service and sales for all bikes, a personal approach, and years of experience with mountain bikes and MTB.

props.headline: About
props.subheadline: All kinds of bikes in Apače — one person, one approach.

props.headline: From passion to workshop and shop
props.quote: A bike is not just transport — it is freedom. We want everyone to take their adventure with them.
body: Vukan's Bike Shop grew out of a love of cycling and the wish for a local place for solid service, honest advice, or a new bike — whether you ride in town, on the road, or on trails.

We are based in Apače. We service and advise on all bike types; our deepest passion and longest experience are still with mountain bikes and MTB — from basic service to full repairs and custom builds. No anonymous workshop — one expert who knows your bike and your needs.
We believe in personal contact, fair pricing, and work you can rely on. If you want a partner for your next rides, you are in the right place.

props.name: Gregor Vukan
props.bio: I have worked with bikes for many years; mountain bikes and tougher terrain especially excite me. At Vukan's Bike Shop I handle service, sales, and advice for every kind of bike — all in one place, personally. I am glad to help you choose the right bike or get it ready for the next season. Call or visit Apače.

props.heading: Why us
props.subheading: Our values are simple: quality, honesty, and your trust.

items.title: All bike types
items.description: Urban, road, gravel, e-bike, and MTB — we know drivetrains, brakes, and geometry. We have the deepest experience with mountain bikes and trail riding.

items.title: Personal approach
items.description: One expert, one point of contact. No anonymous workshop; we work by appointment and fit the time to you.

items.title: Fair pricing
items.description: Clear pricing and quotes. No hidden costs — you know the cost up front.

items.title: Local in Apače
items.description: Shop and service close to you. Partners and events in the region — part of the community.

props.heading: Ready for service or a new bike?
props.subheading: Visit us in Apače or call 070 815 379.
